name: Richmont Mines Inc.
description: Richmont Mines Inc. was a Canadian-based gold mining company headquartered in Rouyn-Noranda, Quebec. Established in 1991, the company specialized in the exploration, development, and operation of gold mining properties, with a primary focus on assets located in Ontario and Quebec. Over its history, Richmont Mines built a strong reputation for its successful track record in gold production and mineral exploration. The company operated as an independent producer until it was acquired by Alamos Gold Inc. in November 2017, marking the end of its tenure as a publicly traded entity on the TSX.
